ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price for the period */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price during the period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price during the period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price for the period */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute component of the timestamp */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour component of the timestamp */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Weekday component of the timestamp */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week component of the timestamp */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month component of the timestamp */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year component of the timestamp */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day component of the timestamp */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence value */,
  "boll_ub" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band value */,
  "boll_lb" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band value */,
  "rsi_30" REAL /* Relative Strength Index value */,
  "dx_30" REAL /* Directional Movement Index value */,
  "close_30_sma" REAL /* 30-day Simple Moving Average of closing prices */,
  "close_60_sma" REAL /* 60-day Simple Moving Average of closing prices */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the period */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "tick_volume" INTEGER /* Number of ticks (trades) in the period */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price */,
  "spread" REAL /* Difference between bid and ask prices */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the trade occurred */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., API, feed provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., forex, stock, commodity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Primary exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is quoted */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry of the instrument (for stocks) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the instrument's issuer */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization (for stocks) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the instrument's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "backtest_period_start" TEXT /* Start date for backtesting */,
  "backtest_period_end" TEXT /* End date for backtesting */,
  "backtest_profit" REAL /* Profit achieved during backtesting */,
  "backtest_max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown during backtesting */,
  "backtest_sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio during backtesting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the performance period */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit achieved during the period */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown during the period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the strategy */,
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backtest performance (if applicable) */,
  "trading_period_start" TEXT /* Start date for the trading period */,
  "trading_period_end" TEXT /* End date for the trading period */,
  "trading_profit" REAL /* Profit achieved during the trading period */,
  "trading_max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown during the trading period */,
  "trading_sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio during the trading period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_backtest_id FOREIGN KEY ("backtest_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the access (e.g., web, mobile app, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data stream */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the data stream */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the data stream */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data stream (e.g., active, paused, closed) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data stream (e.g., tick, minute, hourly) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Data provider (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the data stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_streams_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stream_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed to the data stream */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data stream */,
  "subscription_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, cancelled) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the subscription (e.g., tick, minute, hourly) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Data provider for the subscription */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stream_subscriptions_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES data_streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stream_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
